heading: Omitted
label: 755 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , provided for redemption by Secretary of the Treasury of Puerto Rican silver coins known as the peso and all other Puerto Rican silver and coppers in circulation on , except those imported after , at rate of 60 cents per peso and for recoinage of such coins into United States coins, and made United States coins sole legal tender in payment of debts, except those owing prior to , which were payable in Puerto Rico coins or their exchanged equivalents.act Apr. 12, 1900, ch. 191, § 1131 Stat. 80Apr. 12, 1900Feb. 1, 1900Apr. 12, 1900
